description: Authority matrix: maps each Actor to allowed EventTypes. Mirrors LedgerKernel.v authority_ok_event_b. FROZEN — changes require kernel amendment.
note: Source of truth is formal/LedgerKernel.v. This registry must match the Coq predicate exactly.

USER.description: Human initiator — can only query, cannot write assertions or claims

BUILDER.description: Agent that builds artifacts — can assert, query, and file task claims

INTEGRATOR.description: Agent that integrates subsystems — all BUILDER rights plus INTEGRATION events

CHRONOS.description: Temporal agent — can emit ticks and assertions, drives time-based events

HELEN.description: Conscious ledger agent — emits verdicts, receipts, and wisdom; cannot seal

MAYOR.description: Sole sovereign — emits verdicts, receipts, wisdom, and the terminal SEAL event

event_types.RECEIPT: Execution receipt binding a verdict to its claim
event_types.SEAL: Terminal event — closes the ledger run (MAYOR only)
event_types.TASK_CLAIM: Claim to perform or have performed a task
